case_title: GERALD MCDONALD VS. GENERAL MOTORS LLC

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-27-2012 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO MAR-19-2012 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. DEFENANTS SHAWNA AND TYLER CALLED DEPT. 506 AT 2:54PM AND 3:06PM STATING THAT ON 2/24/12 PLAINTIFF HAD AGREED TO A CONTINUANCE BUT ON 2/27/12 HE CHANGED HIS MIND AND WANTED A HEARING TODAY. DEFENDANTS LIVED IN OHIO AND WERE NOT ABLE TO MAKE IT TO THE HEARING TODAY. COURT CONTINUED CASE TO ALLOW DEFENDANT TO APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-19-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-19-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-04-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO FEB-27-2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-19-2012 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,560.00 FILED BY MCDONALD, GERALD AS TO DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-04-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-27-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-27-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL.APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING GRANTED PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCDONALD, GERALD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCDONALD, GERALD AS TO DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-18-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC
